title: Silly Wither Skeleton
description: Makes the animations and face of the wither skeleton silly.
body:
# **REQUIRES [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

Wither Skeletons are silly now!

## normal walking animation
![walking cycle of the wither skeleton in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cca98540854f0b20b8c3680feebceb0513c17bd.gif)

## angry walking animation
![animation for the wither skeleton when it is agressive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771f8ca158cf426e7d98dff680967483909bcb27.gif)

(swords not accurate to ingame appearence)
